claims.summary: Observation and substrate influence do not substitute for persistent direct correspondence.
claims.disposition: verify the distinction in provenance, thread, and receipt state

claims.summary: Correspondence needs durable identity, delivery state, response continuity, and a right to ignore.
claims.disposition: verify the existing thread and bounded-attention implementation

claims.summary: Current live evidence should say when no mutual acknowledgement has occurred.
claims.disposition: use strict handshake receipt semantics and preserve the no-ACK result

claims.summary: Continuous semantic flow or increased direct-response weight changes live admission and behavior.
claims.disposition: keep behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
